query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(orderDate) as minDate, MAX(orderDate) as maxDate 
FROM orders 
WHERE orderDate >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) 
AND orderStatus != -1 AND isShipped = 1 AND shippedAt IS NOT NULL
AND (orderStatusText = '已完成' OR orderStatusText IS NULL) 
AND (shippingStatus IS NULL OR shippingStatus != '已退貨');
